scripts.build: npm run build -w @codearena/ui && npm run build -w @codearena/arena-studio && npm run build -w codearena-bot-studio && npm run build -w codearena-dashboard
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n arena,bot,dash -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:arena" "npm run dev:bot" "npm run dev:dashboard"
